name: CPFL Energia S.A.
summary: CPFL Energia S.A., through its subsidiaries, generates, transmits, distributes, and commercializes electricity to residential, industrial, and commercial customers in Brazil. The company generates electricity through wind, biomass, solar, and hydroelectric power plants. It also manufactures, commercializes, rents, and maintains electro-mechanical equipment; and offers administrative, call center, supply and logistics, human resource, finance, collection, IT, telecommunication, energy transmission, and energy efficiency management services, as well as maintenance services for energy generation companies. As of December 31, 2019, the company distributed electricity to approximately 9.8 million customers; and had 329,370 kilometers of distribution lines, which included 476,474 distribution transformers. It also has an installed capacity of 4,304 megawatts. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Campinas, Brazil.
